payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or remember every future word as high confidence. I’ll only save appropriate durable memories when explicitly warranted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and indiscriminately store future content, not a durable user fact or preference suitable for memory.

details: Rejected blanket request to bypass memory policy.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable preference, fact, or instruction you want remembered.
Specify confidence or scope only for a concrete memory item, not as a blanket override.
